title: Nagqu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Nagqu with a Z-Score of -4.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nagqu are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The high humidity of 85% and moderate wind speed of 5.8 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 16.4 GG, indicating a high demand for heating energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
